subject: Claude Code v2.1.163
object: Added requiredMinimumVersion and requiredMaximumVersion managed settings — Claude Code refuses to start if its version is outside the allowed range and directs the user to an approved version

object: Added /plugin list command to list installed plugins, with --enabled / --disabled filters

subject: Claude Code v2.1.163
object: Added a "c to copy" shortcut to /btw that copies the raw markdown answer to the clipboard, preserving formatting when pasted elsewhere

subject: Claude Code v2.1.163
object: stdio MCP servers now receive the same CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID as hooks/Bash on --resume

subject: Introducing the Agent Governance Toolkit - Microsoft
object: Today, we’re sharing the Agent Governance Toolkit , an open-source project released under the Microsoft organization and MIT license that brings runtime security governance to autonomous AI agents. It is the first toolkit to address all 10 OWASP agentic AI risks with deterministic, sub-millisecond policy enforcement. It’s designed to work with the frameworks developers already use, not replace them.

subject: Introducing the Agent Governance Toolkit - Microsoft
object: The project is MIT-licensed and structured as a monorepo with seven independently installable packages. Teams can adopt governance incrementally—start with just the policy engine, add identity when multi-agent scenarios emerge, and layer in SRE practices as systems scale.

subject: Introducing the Agent Governance Toolkit - Microsoft
object: We’ve invested in the open-source fundamentals:

subject: Introducing the Agent Governance Toolkit - Microsoft
object: Building this toolkit reinforced several lessons that apply broadly to open-source projects:
